rationale: Gov't Code §2306.1711 governs rulemaking procedures for housing tax credit and bond programs. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: The department shall adopt rules outlining formal rulemaking procedures for the low income housing tax credit program and the multifamily housing mortgage revenue bond program in accordance with Chapter 2001.
_note: No conflict; rule_text addresses unrelated housing program rulemaking procedures.
